svg.title: JavaScript operators complete overview
svg.desc: Six categories of operators: Arithmetic, Assignment, Comparison, Logical, String, and Ternary shown in a tree diagram

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the modulus operator do?')
sendPrompt('What does the modulus % operator do in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What does ++ and -- do in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between == and === in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What do greater than and less than operators do?')
sendPrompt('What does && AND operator do in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What does || OR operator do in JavaScript?')
sendPrompt('What does ! NOT operator do in JavaScript?')

svg.text: Click any box to ask me about it — we will cover all 6 categories below
Just like maths: brackets first, then multiplication, then addition
